_comment: Drives the 'Consumables Used' and 'Defensives Used' checks. Match is case-insensitive substring on the ability NAME, so 'Health Potion' matches 'Silvermoon Health Potion', 'Algari Health Potion', etc. — add a new potion/stone by appending its name, no code change. Consumable usage is counted from WCL's cast-EVENT stream (the aggregate Casts table omits item usage), with spell ids resolved per report from the log's ability map; that resolution reuses these same name patterns. Note: 'create'/'soulburn' casts are excluded so making a Healthstone isn't counted as using one.
